scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:3001/api/health http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist: npm run build:all && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder build --win
